eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Storey; Carson City; Lyon, NV; at 11:07 AM on FEB 13, 2019 Effective until 11:22 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Carson City authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Douglas County, Storey County and Lyon County.  This is only a test No action required
